title: App Settings - General - About - UI
scenario: Verify the About tab is displayed under General in App Settings on the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (three horizontal lines) to open the side navigation.
3. Tap "General" in the side navigation menu.
4. Check that the "About" tab is listed under the General section.
expected: The "About" tab is displayed under General in App Settings, matching the Figma design.
